representative_quotes: This app isn't good. They deduct brokerage charges at will. Sometimes 78, sometimes 84, sometimes 64. It's not a good app these days.
if u are small trader or invester I recommend never go on this platform they give to kuch charge which accumulated your profits.
Today the app crashed & I got 3600 loss because of crashed. Not working the app to sell when I was at profit.. after 2 hour sold the trade at 3600 loss because of grow.
In this app, I often face technical errors when trying to exit the market, and because I’m unable to exit on time, I end up incurring losses.
App lagging reflecting of latest SEBI guidelines.
Rand Customer Service 🤧 BKL Ko 10 min Tak Call karne ka try Kia Koi nahi uthaya 😐 uninstall kar raha 👎
customer service is very bad bina order apne aap kar dete h grow me aaj ka hi order dekh sakte h
worst customer support and irresponsible for the customer service.
isse ghatiya app koi nhi hai 3 se 4 bar order khud se execute ho jata hai or loss ho jata hai aj to hadd ho gya 7k ka loss ho gya ish gande app k vjh se 😡😡😡😡
never do option trading in Groww because GTT orders only trade above our price. disappointed groww

representative_quotes: Dear Team, Please look into this, external funds unable to track in Groww application. Few days error facing i.e. "Tracking external funds is currently paused".
External funds tracking has been paused which was one of the USP of this app.
I have been trying to update my external mutual fund holdings for the last one week, but every time it shows that the “Updation of external holdings is paused.”
